languages.text: "Отныне Зарков — колония протектората фон Валанциус. И настало время назначить губернатора".
"From now on, Zarkov is a colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."
languages.original_text: "Отныне Зарков — колония протектората фон Валанциус. И настало время назначить губернатора".

traits.locale_text: "From now on, Zarkov is a colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."
"From now on, Zarkov is a colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."
"From now on, Zarkov is an official colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."
"From now on, Zarkov is a colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."
"From now on, Zarkov is a colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."

languages.text: 「これより、ザルコフはフォン・ヴァランシウス保護領の正式な植民地となる。総督を任命する時だ」
languages.original_text: "From now on, Zarkov is an official colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."

traits.locale_text: 「これより、ザルコフはフォン・ヴァランシウス保護領の正式な植民地となる。総督を任命する時だ。」

languages.text: « À partir de maintenant, Zarkov est une colonie du protectorat von Valancius. Il est temps de lui donner un gouverneur. »
languages.original_text: "From now on, Zarkov is a colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."

traits.locale_text: « À partir de maintenant, Zarkov est une colonie du protectorat von Valancius. Il est temps de lui donner un gouverneur. »

languages.text: "Şu andan itibaren Zarkov, von Valancius protektorasının kolonisidir. Buraya bir vali atama zamanı geldi."
languages.original_text: "From now on, Zarkov is a colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."

traits.locale_text: "Şu andan itibaren Zarkov, von Valancius protektorasının kolonisidir. Buraya bir vali atama zamanı geldi."

languages.text: "Zarkov ist von nun an eine Kolonie des Protektorats derer von Valancius. Es wird Zeit, einen Gouverneur zu ernennen."
languages.original_text: "From now on, Zarkov is a colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov ist von nun an eine Kolonie des Protektorats derer von Valancius. Es wird Zeit, einen Gouverneur zu ernennen."

languages.text: «A partir de ahora, Zarkov es una colonia del protectorado von Valancius. Es hora de designar un gobernador».
languages.original_text: "From now on, Zarkov is a colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."

traits.locale_text: «A partir de ahora, Zarkov es una colonia del protectorado von Valancius. Es hora de designar un gobernador».

languages.text: “从今往后，扎尔科夫正式成为冯·瓦兰修斯属地的殖民地。现在，是时候任命一位总督了。”
languages.original_text: "From now on, Zarkov is a colony of the von Valancius protectorate. And it is time to appoint a governor."

traits.locale_text: “从今往后，扎尔科夫正式成为冯·瓦兰修斯属地的殖民地。现在，是时候任命一位总督了。”
